channel.title: Freelance Tax Calculator - Tips & Updates
channel.description: Expert tax guides, tips, and resources for freelancers and self-employed professionals

item.title: Freelance Tax & Finance Blog 2026 | FreelanceTaxCalc
item.description: Expert guides on quarterly taxes, self-employed retirement planning, Canada tax tips, and more. Free resources for freelancers and gig workers.

item.title: Free Tax & Finance Guides for Freelancers 2026
item.description: Free guides on freelancer taxes, quarterly payments, deductions, and digital nomad finances. Expert-written for self-employed workers.

item.title: Solo 401(k) vs SEP IRA 2026: Which Retirement Plan is Best for the Self-Employed?
item.description: Compare Solo 401(k) vs SEP IRA for self-employed retirement in 2026. Contribution limits, tax savings, pros & cons, and which plan fits your freelance business.

item.title: 1099 vs W-2 — Which is Better for You?
item.description: Compare 1099 contractor and W-2 employee income, taxes, and benefits. See which status leaves you with more take-home pay.

item.title: Gig Worker Deductions Guide — What You Can Write Off
item.description: Complete guide to gig worker tax deductions for 2026. What DoorDash, Uber, Etsy, and freelance workers can write off.

item.title: Canada Freelance Tax Guide 2026: Income Tax, CPP & Deductions for Self-Employed
item.description: Complete guide to Canadian taxes for freelancers and self-employed in 2026. Federal & provincial rates, CPP contributions, HST/GST, deductions, and filing tips.

item.title: Quarterly Taxes Guide for Freelancers 2026
item.description: Everything freelancers need to know about quarterly estimated taxes. Covers deadlines, Form 1040-ES, and avoiding penalties.

item.title: Quarterly Taxes 2026: The Complete Guide for Freelancers & Self-Employed
item.description: Everything you need to know about quarterly estimated taxes for freelancers, gig workers, and independent contractors in 2026. Due dates, rates, deductions, and how to pay.
